name: ASPAC III Acquisition Corp.
business: ASPAC III Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated in the British Virgin Islands, formed to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not commenced any operations as of December 31, 2025. The company intends to focus on businesses in the Environmental, Sustainability and Governance (ESG) and material technology sector, and has entered into a merger agreement with Bioserica International Limited, a bio-based antimicrobial materials company.

exposures.sentence: Although we intend to focus on businesses in the Environmental, Sustainability and Governance (ESG) and material technology sector, an area where we believe has an optimistic growth trajectory for the coming years.
Bioserica is in the business of researching and developing, manufacturing, marketing and sales of bio-based antimicrobial materials.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: Currently, as a result of the shareholders approval at the 2025 EGM (as defined below), the Company amended and restated its memorandum and articles of association to extend the date by which it has to complete a business combination (the Combination Period ) to November 12, 2026, or up to 24 months from the IPO.
